summary: QuantDinger is an open-source AI trading operating system that enables users to develop, backtest, and execute trading strategies in a self-hosted environment. It aims to provide a comprehensive solution for traders by integrating research, execution, and monitoring into one platform while ensuring user control over their data and keys.
use_cases: Develop and backtest trading strategies using AI models
Execute trades across multiple brokers like IBKR and Alpaca
Monitor trading performance and compliance with audit logs
